name: Cozy Blocks: Undersea Adventure
short_description: A relaxing 3D puzzle game with a block placing mechanic to play solo or with friends in Multiplayer mode! Use your wits to help Kate Nemo and the sea creatures to solve tricky missions in a captivating underwater adventure.
detailed_description:
There is something unique about perfectly filling those slots with blocks!

A cozy, pressure-free block puzzle awaits under the sea!

Sit back, relax and enjoy Cozy Blocks, a stress-free under the sea puzzle adventure!

Choose the right pieces, place them into the tower and solve the puzzle in this unique yet familiar mechanic. Help Kate Nemo and the cute sea creatures to complete tricky missions in the 3 beautiful worlds of this captivating underwater adventure.

  • Take Your Time: No pressure, no timers. Look into the blocks and choose your strategy at your own pace.

  • Flip, Turn, fit: Manipulate the pieces without any constraints. That L-shaped piece is so much better in Cozy Blocks! 

  • Collect cute buddies: As you progress in your adventure, unlock new cute animals that grant special powers to help you beat the puzzles!

  • Story mode: Take your time in this relaxed and casual main mode. Help Kate Nemo in her journey to find her grandfather!

  • Party Game Mode: Versus fun! 2 to 4 players in a score attack.

  • Survival Mode: Complete the lines in the tower to get more oxygen and keep playing!

  • Cozy, Accessible, Fun Gameplay: great for all ages, from grandkids to grandparents!
